title: Under 5 minutes to a deployed LLM endpoint — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: RunPod is a serverless platform that enables deployment of LLM endpoints on rented GPU infrastructure like H100s in under five minutes. It started in 2022 from unused crypto mining hardware and has grown to 500,000 developers with $120 million in annual recurring revenue.
